seoTitle: Wendoree Park vs Wentworth — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wendoree Park and Wentworth. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wendoree Park vs Wentworth: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wendoree Park and Wentworth.
heading: Wendoree Park vs Wentworth — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wendoree Park, New South Wales and Wentworth, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wentworth has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Wendoree Park (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wendoree Park or Wentworth safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wendoree Park has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Wentworth scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wendoree Park scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Wentworth scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wendoree Park or Wentworth?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wentworth has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
